background: What is the probability a study with n=10 will detect a mean difference of 300 grams in birth weight in the SIDS population compared to the general population? Assume σ=720 and use a two-sided α-level of 0.05.

task.query: Calculate the power of the test using the given parameters: n=10, mean difference=300 grams, σ=720, and a two-sided α-level of 0.05.
task.answer: $1-\beta=\Phi\left(-z_1-\frac{.05}{2}+\frac{|\Delta| \sqrt{n}}{\sigma}\right)= \Phi\left(-1.96+\frac{|300| \sqrt{10}}{720}\right)=\Phi(-0.64)=0.2611$. The power of this test is about $26 \%$.
